steps.t: Fastred's home can be found slightly south and east of the Mead Hall.
Théodhild can be found inside Fastred's home in central Snowbourn.
Elflád can be found on the second floor of Fastred's home in central Snowbourn.
Folcred can be found on the second floor of Fastred's house near Elflád.
Fastred can be found inside the Mead Hall of Snowbourn. Cynelac has informed you that Fastred wants to speak with you after you have finished meeting …
Fastred has set out a drink on the table in front of him inside of the Mead Hall of Snowbourn. Reeve Fastred bids you drink with him.
Fastred can be found inside the Mead Hall of Snowbourn. Reeve Fastred desires to speak with you.
